caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I'VE NEVER" and "SUT" sits in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing store. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a mannequin wearing a white t-shirt. Racks of clothing are visible in the background. Across the frames, the man is speaking, shifting his facial expressions from a thoughtful look to a slight smile. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, logos are visible, including one that says "SUT" and another that reads "BOOSTLY TOT". The scene remains static in terms of camera position, focusing on the man's movements and expressions as he speaks into the microphone.
